BNT-PREPRO","ConnectionType":"sqlserver","Database":"amb-func2.cdmcofg7ggyx.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:1433;databaseName=GXfuncional","Name":"fsd001","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"pepais","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"petdoc","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"pendoc","Type":"string"},{"Name":"petipo","Type":"string"},{"Name":"penom","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pedgi","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pefpdg","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pefvdg","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pebps","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pefpbp","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pefvbp","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pejui","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pefjui","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"peemb","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pefemb","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pefalt","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pefbaj","Type":"timestamp"},{"Name":"pepres","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"peexento","Type":"string"},{"Name":"peresinsc","Type":"string"},{"Name":"peresnoins","Type":"string"},{"Name":"penorespon","Type":"string"},{"Name":"peconsfin","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pebceajinf","Type":"string"},{"Name":"peingbruto","Type":"string"},{"Name":"peimpinter","Type":"string"},{"Name":"penrobruto","Type":"decimal(10,2)"},{"Name":"penrointer","Type":"decimal(10,2)"},{"Name":"perg3125","Type":"string"},{"Name":"perg3337","Type":"string"},{"Name":"perg2784","Type":"string"},{"Name":"petipoempr","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"pesn01","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pesn02","Type":"string"},{"Name":"pesn03","Type":"string"}]}],"RedshiftTmpDir":"","Table":"fsd001"}},"node-1762269783365":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1762269468462","node-1762269829643","node-1762270099358","node-1762270130472"],"Name":"#TELEFONOS","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"Pendoc","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Cuenta","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Telefono_Celular","Type":"string"},{"Name":"Telefono_Fijo","Type":"string"}]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"FSR008","From":"node-1762269468462"},{"Alias":"FSR006","From":"node-1762269829643"},{"Alias":"FSR005","From":"node-1762270099358"},{"Alias":"SNGC33","From":"node-1762270130472"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT 
    Pendoc,
    COALESCE(R06_CTNRO, CTNRO, sngc13Ndoc) AS Cuenta,
    CASE 
        WHEN LEFT(Dotelf, 1) = '3' THEN Dotelf 
        WHEN LEFT(Dotelfp, 1) = '3' THEN Dotelfp 
        WHEN sngc16TTel = 2 THEN sngc33Telf
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS Telefono_Celular,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN LEFT(Dotelf, 1) != '3' THEN Dotelf 
        WHEN LEFT(Dotelfp, 1) != '3' THEN Dotelfp 
        WHEN sngc16TTel = 1 THEN sngc33Telf
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS Telefono_Fijo
FROM (
    SELECT 
        F08.Pendoc,
        F08.CTNRO,
        F08.Pepais,
        F08.Petdoc,
        R06.CTNRO AS R06_CTNRO,
        R06.Dotelf,
        R05.Dotelfp,
        SNGC33.sngc13Ndoc,
        SNGC33.sngc16TTel,
        SNGC33.sngc33Telf,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY F08.Pendoc ORDER BY F08.Pendoc) AS rn
    FROM FSR008 AS F08
    LEFT JOIN FSR006 AS R06 ON R06.CTNRO = F08.CTNRO
    LEFT JOIN FSR005 AS R05 ON 
        R05.Pepais = F08.Pepais 
        AND R05.Petdoc = F08.Petdoc 
        AND R05.Pendoc = F08.Pendoc
    LEFT JOIN SNGC33 ON 
        SNGC33.sngc13Ndoc = F08.CTNRO 
        AND SNGC33.SNGC13PAIS = 0 
        AND SNGC33.SNGC13TDOC = 0
) AS Telefonos
WHERE rn = 1 
  AND (
    (LEFT(Dotelf, 1) = '3' AND Dotelf IS NOT NULL) OR
    (LEFT(Dotelfp, 1) = '3' AND Dotelfp IS NOT NULL) OR
    (sngc16TTel = 2 AND sngc33Telf IS NOT NULL) OR
    (LEFT(Dotelf, 1) != '3' AND Dotelf IS NOT NULL) OR
    (LEFT(Dotelfp, 1) != '3' AND Dotelfp IS NOT NULL) OR
    (sngc16TTel = 1 AND sngc33Telf IS NOT NULL)
  )
"}},"node-1762271908467":{"DirectJDBCSource":{"ConnectionName":"Jdbc connection
